product_overview: PricePoint is an AI-driven pricing intelligence engine that guides users through journey-specific questionnaires and produces a three-tier pricing recommendation in-app; a paid investor-grade PDF (Premium Report) can be purchased and generated via the backend payment and report generation APIs.
core_goals: Classify users into Journey A (Established Seller) or Journey B (New Launcher) and route questionnaire logic accordingly.
Capture full, journey-specific cost and market inputs to compute a fully-loaded cost, floor/growth/premium prices, and AI-generated narrative.
Enable freemium experience (complete session + in-app three-tier recommendation) and monetise via purchasable Premium PDF reports.
Provide reliable, auditable report generation using LLM (Claude) with data enrichment and produce a verifiable document ID / report metadata.
Integrate with a payments provider (Dodo Payments) to create checkout sessions and update report purchase state via webhooks; surface purchase/status to clients.
Ensure minimal latency for in-app results (seconds) and robust, retryable PDF generation after successful payment.

features.name: Initialize Report Session
features.description: Create a new pricing session / report record (client submits journey classification, product metadata and questionnaire answers). Returns a documentId/sessionId which drives subsequent status checks, AI generation requests, and payment flow.
user_flows: POST /api/reports/initialize with payload {journey_type, product_info, answers} -> Receive 201 Created with {documentId, sessionId, initial_status:'draft'} -> GET /api/reports/status/:documentId -> Receive 200 with {documentId, status:'draft', sessionId}
POST /api/reports/initialize with malformed or missing required fields -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation errors

features.name: Create Dodo Checkout Session
features.description: Request a Dodo Payments checkout for a Premium Report purchase or re-generation option. Returns a checkout object (checkout_id and checkout_url) that the client can use to complete payment on Dodo's hosted flow.
user_flows: POST /api/checkout with payload {documentId, tier, price, return_url} -> Receive 200 OK with {checkout_id, checkout_url, expires_at}
POST /api/checkout with invalid documentId or unsupported tier -> Receive 400 Bad Request with error detailing invalid documentId/tier

features.name: Poll Payment & Report Status
features.description: Clients poll report status to discover state transitions (draft -> processing -> ready -> paid). This endpoint exposes report lifecycle and, when available, contains download/metadata for the generated Premium Report.
user_flows: GET /api/reports/status/:documentId when report is newly created -> Receive 200 OK with {documentId, status:'draft', progress:0}

GET /api/reports/status/:documentId after payment webhook and report generation complete -> Receive 200 OK with {documentId, status:'ready', report:{report_id, document_id, download_url, generated_at}}
GET /api/reports/status/:unknownDocumentId -> Receive 404 Not Found with error 'document not found' or similar

features.name: Dodo Payments Webhook Receiver
features.description: Endpoint for Dodo Payments to notify PricePoint of checkout events (payment succeeded/failed). On valid webhook events the server updates report purchase state and triggers report generation if required.
user_flows: POST /api/webhooks/dodo with valid signed payment success payload -> Receive 200 OK acknowledgement -> Subsequent GET /api/reports/status/:documentId returns status updated to reflect payment (e.g., status:'paid' or status:'generation_pending')
POST /api/webhooks/dodo with invalid signature or malformed payload -> Receive 401 Unauthorized or 400 Bad Request and no status update occurs

features.name: Generate AI Report (Claude)
features.description: Trigger server-side AI report generation using Claude. Accepts structured session data (or references documentId) and returns an accepted job; final PDF generation may be synchronous or async depending on price tier. Generates ai_output (audit/verdict or launch recommendation) and populates report metadata.
user_flows: POST /api/generate-report with payload {documentId, session_data} -> Receive 202 Accepted with {jobId, documentId, status:'generation_started'} -> Poll GET /api/reports/status/:documentId -> Receive 200 OK with {status:'ready', report:{report_id, document_url, generated_at}}
POST /api/generate-report with insufficient or invalid session_data -> Receive 422 Unprocessable Entity with details about missing/invalid fields and no job created

features.name: Report Management API
features.description: Initialize and manage report lifecycle including Dodo payments checkout and status polling

endpoints.description: Initialize a new report and session
Create a Dodo payments checkout session

known_limitations.impact: Anyone can initialize or generate reports if they have valid payloads
